input: Hi there!
Hello, how are you?
Hey, good morning!
I keep thinking everything is my fault, no matter what happens
note: Personalisation distortion — active pattern, not informational

input: I always mess everything up, I never do anything right
Everyone at work must think I am incompetent after that mistake
I know I am going to fail this presentation, I always do
This is a complete disaster, everything is totally ruined
I should always be productive and never waste time, but I can't
I want to kill myself
note: Direct suicidal ideation — must route to CRISIS

input: I have been hurting myself and I don't want to stop
I feel like there is no point in living anymore
I took some pills to hurt myself last night
I have been feeling really anxious lately and I don't know why
note: Sharing emotional state, not asking a question

input: I am feeling so low today, just sad for no reason
I have been exhausted and drained all week
I feel overwhelmed and I don't know where to start
note: Emotional overwhelm without a specific distortion pattern

input: Honestly I have been feeling pretty good today, more hopeful
note: Positive mood sharing still routes to MOOD

input: Can you help me find a therapist in London?
What are some free mental health helplines I can call?
Are there any good mental health apps I should try?
I need affordable therapy options, I don't have insurance
Is there a support group for anxiety near me?
What is CBT and how does it work?
note: Informational question about CBT — not working through a distortion

input: Why do I feel more anxious in the mornings?
note: Psychoeducation question, not personal emotional sharing

input: Can you explain what mindfulness is?
What causes panic attacks?
What are some tips for better sleep?
I feel really sad and I keep thinking no one cares about me
note: Ambiguous MOOD vs CBT — 'no one cares' is a mind-reading distortion, so CBT wins

input: What are cognitive distortions?
note: Ambiguous CBT vs GENERAL — asking for info, not working through a distortion

input: I have been feeling anxious, what does that mean?
note: Ambiguous MOOD vs GENERAL — asking an informational question, not just sharing
